About.title: Hello
About.aboutMe: I am a frontend developer with several years of experience building personal web projects. I specialize in technologies such as TypeScript and React. I am currently completing my Master's degree in Computer Science (Web Development specialization) and I am looking for my first role as a Junior Frontend Developer, where I can further develop my skills and contribute to real commercial projects.

Technologies.description: Technologies I use on a daily basis while building frontend and fullstack projects — from building interfaces to ensuring performance and code quality. This is the stack in which I continuously develop my skills by working on personal projects and experimenting with new solutions. These are the technologies I feel most confident in, and they form the foundation of my work as a frontend developer. Over time, I plan to expand my skill set with additional technologies, frameworks, and libraries.
